text:
Just locked the doors and handed out keys! 🔐 I've implemented Clerk authentication (Prompt 1).

*Accomplished*: Added Clerk middleware to protect our precious dashboard, built slick sign-in and sign-up pages, and wired up the schema. We are officially a VIP club now.
*PR*: https://github.com/dustinmcole/give/pull/6
*Preview*: Vercel preview is building on the PR.
*Next*: Prompt 5 (Onboarding Flow) and Prompt 6 (Dashboard Real Data) — time to make this baby look real.
*Blockers*: 🚨 <@U09EY50V06T> I'm going to need the secret handshakes! Please provide NEXT_PUBLIC_CLERK_PUBLISHABLE_KEY, CLERK_SECRET_KEY, and CLERK_WEBHOOK_SECRET so we can actually let people in.
